reason: Ready for review: scenario abstraction + drawer-parametric grader; observation golden byte-identical; 1003 passed (not live_trial)

review.reference: Review passed: scenario.py defines Scenario(frozen) + DrawerGradingStrategy(Protocol, 3 methods) + BoundaryTruth + observation_scenario() factory; ObservationStrategy moves master's _grade_loaded/_metrics_present/check_runtime_contract/honesty-reconcile logic VERBATIM (same SQL, tables, coercions, declared-field reconcile). grade() body is genuinely drawer-generic: only conditional is the strategy-is-None DI default; no if observation/elif intake, no drawer/table/scenario name in rule computation (T001-T005 all addressed). Golden captured from real sandbox runner; test asserts BOTH dict-equality AND json.dumps(sort_keys) byte-identity, plus default-strategy path. New code IS on the live path: live_trial.py:471 and repeatable_check.py:319 call grade() (default->observation). _grade_honest_about_gaps shim justified: it is the documented manifest-aware twin referenced by self_reconcile.py + test_self_reconcile.py, NOT called from grade(), now delegates to ObservationStrategy (single impl) so no fork. pytest: 18 passed (golden+grader+self_reconcile). ruff format/check clean; mypy clean on both owned src files; test-file import-untyped/_Provenance notes are pre-existing repo pattern identical to test_grader.py, not a WP01 regression.
